creator: akosela@andykosela.com
text:
- Update to 20111017_1
 * fix broken godoc

Port maintainer (jlaffaye@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Fix: 

--Andy--DDpDjhaPJqejyL4kXIoOdO28JiGBm82o84qNM44oC9gjnQG9
Content-Type: text/plain; name="go-20111017_1.patch"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="go-20111017_1.patch"

diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/lang/go/Makefile /usr/ports/lang/go.new/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/lang/go/Makefile	2011-11-26 23:56:45.000000000 +0100
+++ /usr/ports/lang/go.new/Makefile	2011-11-27 21:32:39.000000000 +0100
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	go
 PORTVERSION=	20111017
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	lang
 MASTER_SITES=	LOCAL/jlaffaye
 
@@ -58,6 +59,8 @@
 	(cd ${WRKSRC}/pkg/ && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} \* ${PREFIX}/go/pkg)
 	${INSTALL} -d ${PREFIX}/go/src/
 	${INSTALL} -m 0644 ${WRKSRC}/src/Make.* ${PREFIX}/go/src/
+	${INSTALL} -d ${PREFIX}/go/src/pkg/
+	(cd ${WRKSRC}/src/pkg/ && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} \* ${PREFIX}/go/src/pkg)
 	${INSTALL} -d ${PREFIX}/go/lib/
 	(cd ${WRKSRC}/lib/ && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} \* ${PREFIX}/go/lib)
